title: bromus arvensis subsp. hyalinus
intro: Bromus arvensis subsp. hyalinus, also known as yellow brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Bromus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal medicine, Bromus arvensis subsp. hyalinus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
